$comment: Known providers for the image-generation capability. Checked in order; first available wins.
description: AI image generation from text prompts. Supports resolution control, aspect ratios, reference images, transparent backgrounds, and cost tracking.

providers.name: nano-banana (Gemini Flash/Pro)
providers.notes: Default model: Gemini 3.1 Flash (~$0.067/1K image). Pro available for highest quality (~$0.134/1K). Transparent backgrounds via green screen + FFmpeg (requires FFmpeg + ImageMagick).

fallback_guidance:
No image generation CLI found. Recommended provider:

  nano-banana — AI image generation via Gemini Flash/Pro
  https://github.com/kingbootoshi/nano-banana-2-skill

Requires: Bun runtime + Gemini API key (free at aistudio.google.com/apikey).
Run the setup steps in this skill's SKILL.md or say 'install nano-banana'.
